prerequisites: Your Agile CRM account subdomain (the `domain` value, used to form the API base URL `https://{domain}.agilecrm.com/dev/`).
The email address registered with your Agile CRM account (the `email` config field), used as the Basic auth username.
Admin access to Agile CRM so you can view the REST API key under Admin Settings.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic authentication)
authMethods.summary: Maps to the connector's `api_key` secret field together with the `email` config field. Agile CRM authenticates each request using HTTP Basic authentication, with the account email as the username and the REST API key as the password.

setupSteps.title: Locate your Agile CRM subdomain
setupSteps.body: Identify your Agile CRM account subdomain. API requests are directed to `https://{domain}.agilecrm.com/dev/`, so enter that subdomain as the `domain` config field.

setupSteps.title: Get your REST API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to Agile CRM and open Admin Settings, then go to the API & Analytics section. Copy the first API Key (the API Key for the REST client). Provide it as the `api_key` secret field.

setupSteps.title: Provide the account email
setupSteps.body: Enter the email address registered with your Agile CRM account as the `email` config field. Agile CRM uses this email as the Basic auth username and the REST API key as the password.
